---
title: "trigger_mariadb_triggerIO_connection"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

# Load connection function
source("../R/trigger_utils.R")
```

```{r}
# Connect to MariaDB/MySQL
con <- connect_trigger_db()
```

```{r}
# List tables
DBI::dbListTables(con)
```

```{r}
# Query example
query <- "SELECT DISTINCT year, month, day, deviceId FROM myair LIMIT 5000;"
df <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, query)
df
```

```{r}
DBI::dbDisconnect(con)
```
